fact.fact: PLN has a transmission line of 80.59 kilometers to increase the reliability of electricity in Sulut and Gorontalo.
fact.source_text: Tingkatkan Keandalan Listrik Sulut dan Gorontalo, PLN Operasikan SUTT Sepanjang 80,59 Kms

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the length of the transmission line as 80.59 kilometers.

fact.fact: PLN has allocated Rp 18.6 billion for electricity connections to illuminate 18,377 families.
fact.source_text: PLN Salurkan Bantuan Penyambungan Listrik Rp 18,6 Miliar untuk Terangi 18.377 Keluarga

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the allocated amount and the number of families to be illuminated.

fact.fact: PLN has signed 16 projects with a total value of Rp 21.1 trillion as part of the 35,000 MW project.
fact.source_text: PLN Tandatangani 16 Proyek 35.000 MW Total 21,1 Triliun

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of projects (16), the total value (21.1 trillion), and the project size (35,000 MW) as claimed in the fact.

fact.fact: PLN can save Rp 60 million per year in maintenance costs by using Mini LNG at the Pesanggaran PLTDG.
fact.source_text: Mulai Gunakan Mini LNG ke PLTDG Pesanggaran, PLN Mampu Hemat Biaya Pemeliharaan Rp 60 M per Tahun

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the fact, including the specific amount of Rp 60 million.

fact.fact: PLN has implemented digitalization, resulting in efficiency of up to Rp 10.85 trillion.
fact.source_text: Digitalisasi PLN Dorong Efisiensi hingga Rp 10,85 Triliun

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the fact about PLN's digitalization and the resulting efficiency.

fact.fact: The electrification ratio in Indonesia is 99.83% as of 06 Apr 2026.

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the electrification ratio as 99.83%.

fact.fact: The electricity grid status in Java and Bali System is 1 normal, 1 alert, 0 deficit as of 08 Apr 2026.

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

fact.fact: The electricity grid status in Eastern Indonesia System is 19 normal, 12 alert, 6 deficit, 1 other as of 08 Apr 2026.

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

fact.fact: PLN operates a 500 kV Sutet transmission line in Kendal as part of the 35,000 Mega Watt project.
fact.source_text: Proyek 35.000 Mega Watt Proyek Jawa-Bali Crossing PLTU Batang PLTU Indramayu Sutet 500 kV Kendal

verdict.reason: The source text does not mention 'as part of the 35,000 Mega Watt project'. It only mentions the project's name.

fact.fact: The electricity grid status in Sumatera System is 4 normal, 3 alert, 1 deficit as of 08 Apr 2026.

verdict.reason: The source text does not mention 'as of 08 Apr 2026' or 'deficit', which are present in the candidate fact.

synthesis.content: PLN has implemented various initiatives to increase the reliability of electricity in Indonesia, including a transmission line of 80.59 kilometers and allocating Rp 18.6 billion for electricity connections to illuminate 18,377 families. The electrification ratio in Indonesia is 99.83%. The electricity grid status in Java and Bali System is 1 normal, 1 alert, 0 deficit, while in Eastern Indonesia System it is 19 normal, 12 alert, 6 deficit, 1 other.
